title: Finite Ring Table Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite ring bad distributivity QF_BV/DRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Two-element ring-table conflict where exact finite replay computes a*(b+c)=1 and (a*b)+(a*c)=0 but distributivity demands equality.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite ring rows only when they add distinct fixed-width algebra-table solver pressure; keep ideal theory, Noetherian/PID/UFD structure, and quantified ring theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite ring tables as deterministic BV or finite-function formulas; the first bad distributivity row now has a checked QF_BV/DRAT artifact.
Replay finite ring witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Continue adding checked proof/evidence routes for failed axiom and universal table claims.
Keep ideal theory, Noetherian/PID/UFD structure, and quantified ring theory marked Lean-horizon.
